name: Black Cat Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the 2 sticks of oleo and set aside.
2. Beat the eggs until foamy.
3. Mix in the flour, white sugar, and brown sugar.
4. Pour in the melted oleo and stir well.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips and nuts.
6. Fill the pie shell with the mixture.
7. Bake at 325 degrees for 1 hour.
